servers.title: Servers
servers.formHint: Panel URL and API key. The key is stored encrypted.
servers.name: Name
servers.confirmDelete: Delete server "{name}"? This cannot be undone.

projects.title: Node.js Projects
projects.name: Name
projects.formHint: The start command comes from the project's package.json
projects.pathHint: Directory containing package.json on the server
projects.startCommandHint: A script from the package.json scripts section
projects.domainsHint: One per line, host:port. May be left empty.
projects.deleteHint: The project will be removed from the panel. The directory on disk is preserved.
projects.confirmDeleteLabel: Type the project name to confirm
projects.pickFolderHint: Open the folder that contains package.json and click Select

databases.title: Databases
databases.name: Database name
databases.confirmDeleteLabel: Type the database name to confirm

updates.title: Versions & Updates
updates.subtitle: Current version, update checks, and install method
updates.versionStatusHint: Compared with the latest GitHub release
updates.notConfigured: GitHub repository is not configured — set it below to check for updates.
updates.deploymentModeHint: Only affects which upgrade command is shown below.
updates.githubTokenHint: Only needed for a private repo. Stored encrypted.
updates.githubOverrideTitle: Advanced — a different repository (for a fork)
updates.githubOverrideHint: Leave blank — updates come from the project's official repository (vsgrade/aapanel-manager). Fill this in only if you run your own fork or a private mirror.
updates.serviceNameHint: Docker: compose service name. systemd/PM2: unit/app name.
updates.selfHint: To apply an update, the panel restarts its own Node project via its own aaPanel API. Enter this panel's details (once).
updates.selfProjectHint: The aaPanel project name this app runs under.
updates.selfApiKeyHint: Your own aaPanel's API key. Stored encrypted. Blank = keep.
updates.autoUpdateHint: The panel downloads the release bundle, runs migrations and restarts itself.
updates.autoUpdateHintGit: The panel updates from Git on the server (git pull → build → migrations) and restarts itself.
updates.stagedReady: Version {version} is prepared and ready to apply.
updates.applyingGit: Updating from Git and building on the server… (a few minutes)
updates.updateUpToDate: You're on the latest version — nothing to update.
updates.updateNeedsServer: One-click update is available on an installed server (requires APP_RELEASE_ROOT). Not available in development.
updates.updateNeedsSelfConfig: Fill in “This panel's self-restart” in the settings below.
updates.rollbackNoPrev: No previous version to roll back to (appears after the first update).
updates.noBundle: This release has no self-update bundle — use the command below.
updates.confirmApplyBody: The panel will switch to {version} and restart (current: {current}). A DB backup and migrations have already run.
updates.confirmRollbackBody: The panel will return to {version} and restart (current: {current}).
updates.confirmGitUpdateBody: The panel will update to {version} from Git: build on the server, run migrations and restart (current: {current}). This takes a few minutes.
updates.confirmGitRollbackBody: The panel will roll back to {version} from Git (rebuild on the server) and restart (current: {current}).
updates.updateTimeout: The new version did not come up in time. Check the project and server logs.
updates.errUnsupportedMode: Self-update is not available for this install method.
updates.errSelfNotConfigured: Self-restart is not configured: set your aaPanel's URL, key and project.
updates.errNotGitRepo: This is not a git repository — reinstall the app via git clone.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Accounts that can sign in to the panel and their roles
users.changePasswordHint: Confirm your current password, then set a new one

err.emailTaken: A user with this email already exists
err.lastAdmin: Cannot delete or demote the last administrator
err.cannotDeleteSelf: You cannot delete your own account
err.confirmMismatch: Confirmation does not match the email
